characterization.uiContextCellRationale: The 2026-07-22 characterization gate showed a topology-bound regression (UI/XPC engine RTF 0.69-0.81 vs CLI 1.02-1.17 on identical engine code) that CLI-context Phase 0 controls cannot detect; future promotions must include at least one app/XPC-driven cell.

amendment20260722.authority: backend refactor review + R1 characterization gate; maintainer endorsed 2026-07-22
amendment20260722.diagnosis: Canonical macOS UI RTF fell 1.04-1.15 (2026-07-16) to 0.88-0.93 (2026-07-20) to 0.69-0.81 (2026-07-22) while interleaved A/B/A CLI benches across the Phase 4 cutover (9a8da874 vs 610125b7 vs HEAD) stayed flat at 1.02-1.17. The engine in the app/XPC topology is submission-starved: ~25% CPU vs ~91% in CLI, zero lossless-channel producer suspensions, normal thread priorities, command buffers executing fast with ~83% of the buffer timeline submission-side idle (Metal System Trace, summarized then discarded). Working mechanism: per-frame cross-actor suspension points pay scheduler latency under foreground load, compounded by per-chunk v9 telemetry publication.
changes: Phase 7 rescoped from raw chunk/preview RTF experiments to the delivery-pipeline pacing fix: coalesce per-frame actor hops, move v9 per-chunk publication off the generation path, and evaluate larger macOS chunk schedules; secret-sauce first-preview latency and trim/unload safety must not regress.
Promotion characterization matrices must include at least one UI/app-XPC-context cell (promotedMatrixRequiresUIContextCell).
Phase 14 mechanical retirement is pulled forward: scheduled immediately after the phase 7-9 block, before phases 10-13, so quality/long-form work builds on one topology.

amendment20260723.diagnosis: The canonical macOS UI RTF decline was dominated by a benchmark observer effect: XCUITest default automatic screen recording (testmanagerd-spawned VTEncoderXPCService plus replayd) video-encoded the display through every UI take. With preferredScreenCaptureFormat=screenshots on both UI schemes the one-cell custom/long lane moved from warm RTF 0.70-0.78 to 1.196 with clean QC. Engine code remained exonerated (flat interleaved CLI A/B across the cutover). True Mac capability at product -O optimization measured 1.81 in an interactive CLI process; the honest remaining UI/XPC-context gap is approximately 1.2 versus 1.8.
amendment20260723.phase7Objective: Close the honest UI/XPC-context gap (~1.2 -> ~1.8): quantify and reduce the service-topology cost with recording disabled, using the per-generation processTaskRole/QoS telemetry now recorded in every row. Pre-2026-07-23 UI-generation records carry the recording overhead and are not baselines for post-change comparisons.
amendment20260723.experimentReverts: Three diagnostic engine-loop changes (generation task priority pin, per-token publishProgress coalescing, dedicated userInteractive actor executor) were reverted after two intermittent Fast-QC hard failures appeared with them in-tree; 12/12 takes passed QC after the revert. Any future re-introduction requires its own fixed-seed QC soak.
amendment20260723.phase7Result: Implemented 2026-07-23: generationPerformanceGate environment value renders glass surfaces with the solid-fill fallback while a generation is active. One-cell custom/long warm RTF 1.833 (pre-gate 1.37; no-glass ceiling 1.842); full matrix custom 1.67-1.84, design 1.79-1.94, clone 1.43-1.86. Root cause chain: XCUITest screen recording (fixed via preferredScreenCaptureFormat) then Liquid Glass compositor work (gated); XPC topology measured ~3%.
